title: Introduce AI-based review gates for phase outputs with extensible evaluator architecture
notes: Suggestion #4 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-03). Add AI-assisted quality review for phase outputs (generation, linguistic annotation, image generation, rendering), starting with high-value checks: missing/empty outputs and obvious structural anomalies (e.g., segmentation_phase_2 token spans that cover entire segments). Extend to more complex checks, especially MWE identification quality, potentially with language-specific prompts and multi-model/panel evaluators. Architecture should be evaluator-pluggable and versionable so stronger models/prompts can be adopted without redesigning the pipeline.
